sicakakiskangirissicakligi.helper: Sıcak akışkanın ısı değiştiriciye giriş sıcaklığı. Kaynak: TEMA Standartları.

sicakakiskancikissicakligi.label: Sıcak Akışkan Çıkış Sıcaklığı
sicakakiskancikissicakligi.helper: Sıcak akışkanın ısı değiştiriciden çıkış sıcaklığı. Kaynak: TEMA Standartları.

sogukakiskandebisi.label: Soğuk Akışkan Debisi
sogukakiskandebisi.helper: Soğuk akışkanın kütlesel debisi. Kaynak: TEMA Standartları.

sogukakiskangirissicakligi.label: Soğuk Akışkan Giriş Sıcaklığı
sogukakiskangirissicakligi.helper: Soğuk akışkanın ısı değiştiriciye giriş sıcaklığı. Kaynak: TEMA Standartları.

sogukakiskancikissicakligi.label: Soğuk Akışkan Çıkış Sıcaklığı
sogukakiskancikissicakligi.helper: Soğuk akışkanın ısı değiştiriciden çıkış sıcaklığı. Kaynak: TEMA Standartları.

sicakakiskanozgulisi.label: Sıcak Akışkan Özgül Isısı
sicakakiskanozgulisi.helper: Sıcak akışkanın özgül ısısı. Su için 4.18 kJ/(kg·K). Kaynak: Laufzeitodinamik tablolar.

sogukakiskanozgulisi.label: Soğuk Akışkan Özgül Isısı
sogukakiskanozgulisi.helper: Soğuk akışkanın özgül ısısı. Kaynak: Laufzeitodinamik tablolar.

istransferkatsayisi.label: Toplam Isı Transfer Katsayısı
istransferkatsayisi.helper: Isı değiştiricideki toplam ısı transfer katsayısı. Kaynak: TEMA Standartları, prory's Chemical Engineers' Handbook.

akisduzeni.label: Akış Düzeni
akisduzeni.helper: Akış düzeni: parallel (paralel), counter (ters), cross (çapraz). Kaynak: TEMA Standartları.

havadebisi.label: Hava Debisi (Q)
havadebisi.helper: Baca veya havalandırma kanalından geçen hava debisi. Tasarım için temel parametre. Kaynak: ASHRAE Fundamentals, ISO 16890.

hizsiniri.label: Maksimum Hava Hızı (V_max)
hizsiniri.helper: Kanal içinde önerilen maksimum hava hızı. Yüksek hız gürültü ve basınç kaybını artırır. Kaynak: ASHRAE, SMACNA.

kanalsekli.label: Kanal Kesit Şekli
kanalsekli.helper: Kanal kesit geometrisi. Yuvarlak kanallar daha düşük sürtünme kaybı sağlar. Kaynak: SMACNA.

enboyorani.label: En/Boy Oranı (dikdörtgen için)
enboyorani.helper: Dikdörtgen kanallarda en/boy oranı. 1:1 ideal, yüksek oran basınç kaybını artırır. Kaynak: SMACNA.

kaynaksesseviyesi.label: Kaynak Ses Seviyesi (dB)
kaynaksesseviyesi.helper: Gürültü kaynağının ses basınç seviyesi. ISO 3740 serisi standartlarına göre ölçülür.

malzemetipi.label: Yalıtım Malzemesi Türü
malzemetipi.helper: Farklı malzemelerin ses yalıtım katsayıları (STC) ASTM E413 standardına göre belirlenir.

malzemekalınlık.label: Malzeme Kalınlığı (mm)
malzemekalınlık.helper: Yalıtım malzemesinin kalınlığı, ses iletim kaybını doğrudan etkiler. ISO 717-1 standardı referans alınır.

duvartipi.label: Duvar Tipi
duvartipi.helper: Duvar yapısı, ses yalıtım proformansını belirler. ASTM E90 test yöntemi kullanılır.

ortamsıcaklık.label: Ortam Sıcaklığı (°C)
ortamsıcaklık.helper: Sıcaklık, malzeme yoğunluğunu ve ses hızını etkiler. ISO 9613-2 standardı referans alınır.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güveni (0-1)
dataconfidence.helper: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirliği. Düşük değerler sonucu daha muhafazakar yapar.

basemetalthickness.label: Base Metal Dicke
basemetalthickness.helper: Dicke of the base metal to be welded. pro AWS D1.1 and ISO 15609-1, Preheat temproature depEndes on Dicke.

carbonequivalent.label: Carbon Equivalent (CE)
carbonequivalent.helper: Carbon equivalent Wert calculated from Material composition. Based on IIW formula: CE = C + Mn/6 + (Cr+Mo+V)/5 + (Ni+Cu)/15. Higher CE requires higher preheat.

hydrogenlevel.label: Hydrogen Level
hydrogenlevel.helper: Hydrogen content in weld metal pro ISO 3690. Low: <5 ml/100g, Medium: 5-10 ml/100g, High: >10 ml/100g. Affects preheat to avoid hydrogen cracking.

heatinput.label: Heat Input
heatinput.helper: Heat input during welding. Calculated as (Voltage * Strom * 60) / Travel Speed. Lower heat input may require higher preheat.

restraintdegree.label: Restraint Degree
restraintdegree.helper: Degree of joint restraint. High restraint increases risk of cracking, requiring higher preheat. pro AWS D1.1.

ambienttemperature.label: Ambient Temproature
ambienttemperature.helper: Temproature of the surrounding environment. Lower ambient temproature may require higher preheat.

processmean.label: Proses Ortalaması
processmean.helper: Prosesin merkezi eğilimini temsil eder. Genellikle örneklem ortalaması olarak hesaplanır. Kaynak: ISO 7870-1, Shewhart kontrol kartları.

processstddev.label: Proses Standart Sapması
processstddev.helper: Proses değişkenliğinin ölçüsü. Genellikle örneklem standart sapması veya hareketli aralık ortalamasından tahmin edilir. Kaynak: ISO 7870-2.

samplesize.label: Alt Grup Büyüklüğü (n)
samplesize.helper: Her bir alt gruptaki ölçüm sayısı. Kontrol limitleri hesaplamasında kullanılır. Kaynak: Montgomery, Introduction to Statistical Quality Control.

numsigmas.label: Sigma Sayısı (k)
numsigmas.helper: Kontrol limitlerinin genişliğini belirler. Genellikle 3 sigma kullanılır. Kaynak: Shewhart kontrol kartı prensipleri.

charttype.label: Kontrol Kartı Türü
charttype.helper: Kullanılacak Shewhart kontrol kartı tipi. Değişken ve nitelik kartları arasından seçim yapılır. Kaynak: ISO 7870 serisi.

defects.label: Defect Count
defects.helper: Toplam hata sayısı. Six Sigma projelerinde temel ölçüt.

units.label: Unit Count
units.helper: Üretilen veya test edilen toplam birim sayısı.

opportunitiesperunit.label: Opportunities pro Unit
opportunitiesperunit.helper: Her birimde hata oluşma fırsatı sayısı. Genellikle ürün karmaşıklığına bağlı.

sigmashift.label: Sigma Shift
sigmashift.helper: Uzun dönem sigma seviyesine uygulanan kayma. Six Sigma'da standart 1.5 sigma kayması kullanılır (Motorola).

machinerate.label: Machine Satz
machinerate.helper: Loaded shop Satz including oproator burden.

plannedhours.label: Planned run Stunden
plannedhours.helper: Rüstzeit plus production Stunden on the job.

downtimehours.label: Expected downtime
downtimehours.helper: Tool changes, first-off Prüfung, minor stops.

materialcost.label: Material Kosten
materialcost.helper: Stock, fixturing VerbrauchsMaterial for the job.

scraprate.label: Scrap Satz
scraprate.helper: Historical scrap procent for similar jobs.

quotedprice.label: Quoted Preis
quotedprice.helper: Preis you plan to charge the customer.

plannedproductiontime.label: Planned Production Time (min)
plannedproductiontime.helper: Total time scheduled for production pro shift. Based on ISO 22400 OEE standard.

operatingtime.label: Oproating Time (min)
operatingtime.helper: Actual time machine is running. Calculated as planned production time minus downtime losses.

idealcycletime.label: Ideal Taktzeit (min/part)
idealcycletime.helper: Theoretical minimum time to produce one part under optimal conditions. From machine specifications.

totalpartsproduced.label: Total Parts Produced
totalpartsproduced.helper: Total count of parts produced during oproating time.

goodpartsproduced.label: Good Parts Produced
goodpartsproduced.helper: Parts meeting quality standards. verbraucht to calculate quality Satz.

downtimeloss.label: Downtime Loss (min)
downtimeloss.helper: Total unplanned downtime including breakdowns, Rüstzeit, and adjustments.

speedlossfactor.label: Speed Loss Factor
speedlossfactor.helper: Ratio of actual speed to ideal speed. Calculated as (ideal Taktzeit * total parts) / oproating time.

defectrate.label: Defect Satz
defectrate.helper: Fraction of defective parts. Calculated as (total - good) / total.

costperpart.label: Kosten pro part ($)
costperpart.helper: Standard Kosten pro part including Material, labor, and overhead.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjusted output.

emptyreturnpercent.label: Empty return
emptyreturnpercent.helper: Unpaid return miles as procent of loaded Entfernung.

driverrate.label: Driver Satz
driverrate.helper: Fully loaded driver Kosten pro hour.

tolls.label: Maut
tolls.helper: Road and bridge Maut for the lane.

routedistance.label: Route Entfernung
routedistance.helper: Total Entfernung of the logistics route. Based on standard Transportation metrics (WERC).

fuelconsumptionperkm.label: Kraftstoff Verbrauch pro km
fuelconsumptionperkm.helper: Average Kraftstoff Verbrauch of the vehicle. Influenced by vehicle type and load (ISO 50001).

fuelpriceperliter.label: Kraftstoff Preis pro Liter
fuelpriceperliter.helper: Strom market Preis of Kraftstoff. verbraucht to calculate direct Kraftstoff Kosten.

driverhourlyrate.label: Driver Hourly Satz
driverhourlyrate.helper: Hourly wage of the driver including benefits. Based on labor standards.

averagespeed.label: Average Speed
averagespeed.helper: Average speed of the vehicle on the route. Affects travel time and driver Kosten.

loadfactor.label: Lastfaktor
loadfactor.helper: procentage of vehicle capacity utilized. Low Lastfaktor increases loss pro unit (Lean principles).

maintenancecostperkm.label: Maintenance Kosten pro km
maintenancecostperkm.helper: Average maintenance Kosten pro kilometer. Includes tires, repairs, etc. (ISO 50001).

tollcost.label: Toll Kosten
tollcost.helper: Total toll fees for the route. Direct Kosten.

cargovalue.label: Cargo Wert
cargovalue.helper: Total Wert of the cargo being Transported. verbraucht to calculate risk and insurance Kostens.

insurancerate.label: Insurance Satz
insurancerate.helper: Insurance premium Satz as procentage of cargo Wert. Based on risk assessment.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in the input data. verbraucht to adjust final loss estimate (Six Sigma).

peakrate.label: Peak Satz
peakrate.helper: Utility tariff Satz for peak demand charges. Typically from utility contract or published tariffs.

peakdemand.label: Peak Demand
peakdemand.helper: Maximum Leistung demand during billing proiod. Based on utility meter readings. ISO 50001 Energie management standard.

billingperiod.label: Billing proiod
billingperiod.helper: Frequency of billing cycle. DeLaufzeitines Kosten scaling. Common utility practice.

peakhours.label: Peak Stunden pro Day
peakhours.helper: Number of Stunden pro day considered peak. Defined by utility or ISO 50001 peak load management.

operatingdays.label: Oproating Tage pro proiod
operatingdays.helper: Number of Tage facility opeSatzs in billing proiod. verbraucht for Energie Kosten allocation. Industry standard.

energyprice.label: Energie Preis
energyprice.helper: Kosten pro kWh for Energie consumed. From utility tariff. ISO 50001 Energie Kosten analysis.

loadfactor.label: Lastfaktor
loadfactor.helper: Ratio of average load to peak load. Indicates efficiency. Industry benchmark for demand management.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Quality of input data. Affects confidence adjustment. Common in financial analysis.

monthlyingredientcost.label: Monthly Ingredient Kosten
monthlyingredientcost.helper: Total ingredient spEnde for the proiod.

wasterate.label: Ausschuss Satz
wasterate.helper: Spoilage, trim and overportion loss as procent of Ingredient Kosten.

targetwasterate.label: Sollwert Ausschuss Satz
targetwasterate.helper: Oproational Sollwert or prior best proiod.

monthlyrevenue.label: Monthly revenue
monthlyrevenue.helper: Lebensmittel sales for the same proiod.

grossmargin.label: Gross margin
grossmargin.helper: Strom gross margin before Ausschuss adjustment.

totalfoodpurchased.label: Total Lebensmittel Purchased (kg)
totalfoodpurchased.helper: Total Gewicht of Lebensmittel purchased in a given proiod. Based on inventory management standards (APICS).

wastepercentage.label: Ausschuss procentage (%)
wastepercentage.helper: procentage of purchased Lebensmittel that is Ausschussd. Industry benchmark from Lean Six Sigma Ausschuss reduction.

averagecostperkg.label: Average Kosten pro kg ($)
averagecostperkg.helper: Average Purchase Kosten pro kg of Lebensmittel. Financial input for margin calculation.

averagesellingpriceperkg.label: Average Selling Preis pro kg ($)
averagesellingpriceperkg.placeholder: Average Selling Preis pro kg ($) eingeben
averagesellingpriceperkg.helper: Average Selling Preis pro kg of Lebensmittel. verbraucht to compute lost revenue.

perioddays.label: proiod (Tage)
perioddays.helper: Time proiod for analysis. Standard reporting proiod (monthly).

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in data accuracy. Adjusts final result for uncertainty (ISO 9001 data quality).

dailysitecost.label: Daily site Kosten
dailysitecost.helper: Crew, equipment and overhead pro day on site.

laborbudget.label: Labor budget
laborbudget.helper: Planned labor spEnde for the scope.

laboroverrunpercent.label: Labor overrun
laboroverrunpercent.helper: Expected labor Kosten drift above budget.

materialbudget.label: Material budget
materialbudget.helper: Planned Material spEnde for the scope.

materialoverrunpercent.label: Material overrun
materialoverrunpercent.helper: Expected Material Kosten drift above budget.

originalbudget.label: Original Budget
originalbudget.helper: Initial approved budget for the construction project. Based on PMBOK Kosten baseline.

actualcost.label: Actual Kosten to Date
actualcost.helper: Total expEndeiture incurred so far. From project accounting.

plannedprogress.label: Planned Progress (%)
plannedprogress.helper: Scheduled completion procentage at Strom date. Earned Wert Management (EVM) metric.

actualprogress.label: Actual Progress (%)
actualprogress.helper: Physical procentage of work completed. Measured via site reports.

projectduration.label: Project Dauer
projectduration.helper: Total planned Dauer from Start to finish.

contingencyreserve.label: Reserve Reserve
contingencyreserve.helper: Budget set aside for unforeseen Kostens. PMBOK risk management.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Reliability of input data. Low = high uncertainty, high = audited data.

materialcost.label: Material Kosten
materialcost.helper: Sheet stock and Material spEnde for the job or proiod.

scraprate.label: Scrap Satz
scraprate.helper: procentage of Material Ausschussd. Typical range 10-30% for sheet metal. Source: Lean manufacturing standards.

targetscraprate.label: Sollwert Scrap Satz
targetscraprate.helper: Acceptable scrap Sollwert for similar jobs.

reworkhours.label: Rework Stunden
reworkhours.helper: BEnde, fit-up and finishing rework Stunden expected.

laborrate.label: Labor Satz
laborrate.helper: Fully loaded shop Labor Satz.

finishingcost.label: Finishing Kosten
finishingcost.helper: Powder coat, deburr and finishing spEnde tied to rework risk.

materialcostperkg.label: Material Kosten pro kg
materialcostperkg.helper: Strom market Preis of sheet metal. Source: industry benchmark (e.g., MEPS).

productionvolume.label: Annual Production Volumen
productionvolume.helper: Total units produced pro year. verbraucht to scale scrap Kosten.

partweight.label: Part Gewicht
partweight.helper: Gewicht of each finished part. Source: engineering BOM.

laborcostperhour.label: Labor Kosten pro Hour
laborcostperhour.helper: Average hourly wage including overhead. Source: industry labor surveys.

cycletimeperpart.label: Taktzeit pro part
cycletimeperpart.helper: Time to produce one part. Source: time studies.

disposalcostperkg.label: Disposal Kosten pro kg
disposalcostperkg.helper: Kosten to dispose of scrap Material. Source: Ausschuss management contracts.

reworkrate.label: Rework Satz
reworkrate.helper: procentage of parts requiring rework. Source: quality records.

reworkcostperpart.label: Rework Kosten pro part
reworkcostperpart.helper: Average Kosten to rework a defective part. Source: Kosten accounting.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Affects risk adjustment. Source: data governance policy.

ingredientcost.label: Ingredient Kosten
ingredientcost.helper: Total ingredient spEnde before Ausschuss adjustment.

wasterate.label: Ausschuss Satz
wasterate.helper: Spoilage and portion drift as procent of Ingredient Kosten.

targetfoodcostpercent.label: Sollwert Lebensmittel Kosten
targetfoodcostpercent.helper: Sollwert Lebensmittel Kosten procent for this menu mix.

menuitemprice.label: Menu Item Preis
menuitemprice.helper: Selling Preis of the menu item as listed on the menu. Based on standard menu engineering principles (Kasavana & Smith).

overheadcost.helper: Allocated overhead such as Miete, admin and indirect labor.

wasterate.label: Ausschuss Satz
wasterate.helper: Expected scrap or Ausschuss as a procent of direct Kosten stack.

setuptimecost.label: Rüstzeit time Kosten
setuptimecost.helper: Programming, tooling and first-off Rüstzeit burden.

shippingcost.label: Shipping Kosten
shippingcost.helper: Freight, packaging and Delivery Kosten for the quote.

paymenttermcost.label: Payment Laufzeit Kosten
paymenttermcost.helper: Financing or delay Kosten from customer payment Laufzeits.

targetmarginrate.label: Sollwert margin Satz
targetmarginrate.helper: Sollwert gross margin procent for the quoted Preis.

discountrate.label: Rabatt Satz (%)
discountrate.helper: Negotiated Rabatt off list Preis. Common in B2B sales.

taxincluded.label: Tax included in Kostens
taxincluded.helper: Mark when entered Kostens already include sales tax or VAT.

safetymarginuplift.label: Safety margin uplift
safetymarginuplift.helper: Extra margin points added to build the minimum safe Preis floor.

unitcost.label: Unit Kosten (COGS pro unit)
unitcost.helper: Direct Kosten pro unit including Materials, labor, and overhead. Based on standard Kosten accounting (GAAP).

desiredprofitmargin.label: Desired Profit Margin (%)
desiredprofitmargin.helper: Sollwert profit margin as procentage of Selling Preis. Common industry benchmark: 10-30% for manufacturing.

overheadrate.label: Overhead Satz (%)
overheadrate.helper: Indirect Kostens as procentage of direct Kostens. Based on activity-based Kostening (ABC) principles.

quantity.label: Menge
quantity.helper: Number of units in the quote. Volumen Rabatts may apply.

taxrate.label: Tax Satz (%)
taxrate.helper: Sales tax or VAT applicable to the transaction.

currency.label: Currency
currency.helper: ISO 4217 currency code for financial reporting.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Affects risk adjustment.

fixedmonthlycost.label: Fixed monthly Kosten
fixedmonthlycost.helper: Miete, depreciation, admin and indirect burden for the month.

monthlymachinehours.label: Monthly Machine Stunden
monthlymachinehours.helper: Billable or scheduled spindle Stunden pro month.

variablecostperhour.label: Variable Kosten pro hour
variablecostperhour.helper: Leistung, VerbrauchsMaterial and direct variable burden pro hour.

directlaborcostperhour.label: Direct Labor Kosten pro Hour
directlaborcostperhour.placeholder: Direct Labor Kosten pro Hour eingeben
directlaborcostperhour.helper: Hourly wage including benefits and payroll taxes. Based on industry standards (Bureau of Labor Statistics).

overheadrate.label: Overhead Satz
overheadrate.helper: procentage of direct labor Kosten allocated to overhead (facilities, utilities, indirect labor). Typical range 100-200% in manufacturing.

machinecostperhour.label: Machine Kosten pro Hour
machinecostperhour.helper: Depreciation, maintenance, and Energie Kosten pro machine hour. Based on equipment lifecycle Kostening.

materialcostperunit.label: Material Kosten pro unit
materialcostperunit.helper: Direct Material Kosten pro unit produced. Includes raw Materials and purchased components.

productionrateperhour.label: Production Satz pro Hour
productionrateperhour.helper: Number of units produced pro hour. Based on standard time studies (Maynard).

defectrate.label: Defect Satz
defectrate.helper: procentage of defective units. Six Sigma Sollwert < 0.34% (3.4 DPMO).

utilizationrate.label: Utilization Satz
utilizationrate.helper: procentage of available time that equipment or labor is productive. World-class manufacturing Sollwert > 85% (OEE).

profitmargin.label: Profit Margin
profitmargin.helper: Desired profit margin on shop Satz. Industry average 15-25%.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data. Affects risk adjustment in final Satz.

fixedcost.label: Fixed Kosten
fixedcost.helper: Monthly fixed overhead for the proiod.

variablecostperunit.label: Variable Kosten pro unit
variablecostperunit.helper: Variable Kosten incurred pro unit produced. Standard Kosten accounting.

currentvolume.label: Strom Volumen
currentvolume.helper: Units sold or produced in the proiod.

fixedcosts.label: Fixed Kostens
fixedcosts.helper: Total Fixed Kostens (e.g., Miete, salaries) pro proiod. Based on Kosten accounting standards.

sellingpriceperunit.label: Selling Preis pro unit
sellingpriceperunit.helper: Preis at which each unit is sold. Market pricing analysis.

actualsalesvolume.label: Actual Sales Volumen
actualsalesvolume.helper: Actual number of units sold in the proiod. Sales data.

timeperiod.label: Time proiod
timeperiod.helper: proiod for which Kostens and sales are measured. Aligns with financial reporting proiods.

partscost.label: Parts Kosten
partscost.helper: Kosten of replacement parts from supplier or OEM catalog. Based on industry standard parts pricing.

laborhours.label: Labor Stunden
laborhours.helper: Estimated time for repair based on standard labor time guides (e.g., Mitchell, Chilton).

laborrate.label: Labor Satz pro Hour
laborrate.helper: Shop's hourly labor charge. Varies by region and shop type (dealership vs indepEndeent).

shopsuppliespercent.label: Shop supplies procent
shopsuppliespercent.helper: Shop supplies and VerbrauchsMaterial on parts subtotal.

targetmarginrate.label: Sollwert margin Satz
targetmarginrate.helper: Sollwert gross margin on the quoted Preis.

shopsuppliesfee.label: Shop Supplies Fee
shopsuppliesfee.helper: Fee for VerbrauchsMaterial like lubricants, rags, etc. Common practice in auto repair.

hazardouswastefee.label: Hazardous Ausschuss Fee
hazardouswastefee.helper: Fee for disposal of hazardous Materials (oil, batteries). Regulatory compliance.

taxrate.label: Sales Tax Satz
taxrate.helper: Applicable sales tax procentage for parts and supplies. Based on local tax laws.

discountpercent.label: Rabatt procent
discountpercent.helper: Optional Rabatt on total quote (e.g., loyalty or promotional Rabatt).

customertype.label: Customer Type
customertype.helper: DeLaufzeitines pricing tier. Insurance jobs may have negotiated Satzs. Based on industry practice.

energyemissionston.label: Energie emissions
energyemissionston.helper: Energie-related emissions for the production batch.

fuelemissionston.label: Kraftstoff emissions
fuelemissionston.helper: Kraftstoff and Transport emissions for the batch.

productweight.label: Product Gewicht
productweight.helper: ISO 14040:2006 Life cycle assessment principles and framework. Gewicht of the product unit.

materialtype.label: Material Type
materialtype.helper: ISO 14067:2018 Carbon footprint of products. DiffeMiete Materials have diffeMiete emission factors.

emissionfactormaterial.label: Emission Factor (Material)
emissionfactormaterial.helper: IPCC Guidelines for National Greenhouse Gas Inventories. Default factors for Material production.

productionenergy.label: Production Energie
productionenergy.helper: ISO 50001 Energie management. Energie consumed during manufacturing pro unit product.

gridemissionfactor.label: Grid Emission Factor
gridemissionfactor.helper: IEA data or national grid emission factors. verbraucht to convert electricity to emissions.

transportdistance.label: Transport Entfernung
transportdistance.helper: ISO 14083:2023 Greenhouse gas emissions from Transport chains. Entfernung from production to customer.

transportmode.label: Transport Mode
transportmode.helper: DiffeMiete modes have diffeMiete emission factors pro tonne-km (e.g., DEFRA conversion factors).

emissionfactortransport.label: Emission Factor (Transport)
emissionfactortransport.helper: DEFRA or IPCC emission factors for freight Transport.

usephaseenergy.label: Use Phase Energie
usephaseenergy.helper: Energie consumed during product use over its lifetime. Relevant for Energie-using products.

usephaseemissionfactor.label: Use Phase Emission Factor
usephaseemissionfactor.helper: Same as grid emission factor or specific Kraftstoff emission factor.

endofliferecyclingrate.label: Ende-of-Life Recycling Satz
endofliferecyclingrate.helper: ISO 14044:2006 Life cycle assessment. Recycling reduces Netto emissions.

recyclingemissionfactor.label: Recycling Emission Factor
recyclingemissionfactor.helper: Emissions from recycling process pro kg of Material.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective assessment of input data quality. Affects confidence adjustment.

availability.label: Verfügbarkeit
availability.helper: Running time vs planned production time.

quality.label: Qualität
quality.helper: Gute Einheiten vs total units produced.

machinerate.label: Machine Satz
machinerate.helper: Loaded hourly Machine Kosten for loss estimate.

plannedhours.label: Planned Stunden
plannedhours.helper: Planned production Stunden in the proiod.

downtimehours.label: Downtime Stunden
downtimehours.helper: Unplanned or visible downtime in the proiod.

plannedproductiontime.label: Planned Production Time (minutes)
plannedproductiontime.helper: Total time scheduled for production pro shift/day. Based on ISO 22400 and OEE industry standard.

operatingtime.label: Oproating Time (minutes)
operatingtime.helper: Actual time equipment is running (planned production time minus downtime). ISO 22400.

idealcycletime.label: Ideal Taktzeit (minutes pro unit)
idealcycletime.helper: Theoretical minimum time to produce one unit under optimal conditions. ISO 22400.

totalpartsproduced.label: Total Parts Produced
totalpartsproduced.helper: Total number of units produced during oproating time.

goodpartsproduced.label: Good Parts Produced
goodpartsproduced.helper: Number of units meeting quality standards (first pass yield).

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in data accuracy. verbraucht for adjusted OEE. Common in lean manufacturing assessments.

leakpercent.label: Leak procent
leakpercent.helper: Estimated compressed air leak as procent of output.

numberofleaks.label: Number of Leaks
numberofleaks.helper: Total number of compressed air leaks identified. Based on ISO 11011 standard for compressed air Energie audits.

leaksize.label: Average Leak Size
leaksize.helper: Equivalent orifice Durchmesser of typical leaks. Common sizes: 1mm (small), 3mm (medium), 5mm (large), 10mm (very large). Based on compressed air leak quantification methods.

operatinghoursperday.label: Oproating Stunden pro Day
operatinghoursperday.helper: Stunden pro day the compressed air system opeSatzs. verbraucht to calculate annual Energie Verbrauch.

operatingdaysperyear.label: Oproating Tage pro Year
operatingdaysperyear.helper: Number of Tage pro year the system runs. Typical industrial oproation: 250 Tage (5 Tage/week, 50 weeks).

electricitycostperkwh.label: Electricity Kosten pro kWh
electricitycostperkwh.helper: Average electricity Satz. Varies by region; typical US industrial Satz ~$0.12/kWh. Source: EIA.

compressorpowerpercfm.label: Compressor Specific Leistung
compressorpowerpercfm.helper: Leistung required to produce 1 cfm of compressed air. Typical range 0.18-0.35 kW/cfm depEndeing on compressor type and efficiency. Based on DOE compressed air guidelines.

leakflowratepersize.label: Leak Durchfluss Satz pro Size
leakflowratepersize.placeholder: Leak Durchfluss Satz pro Size eingeben
leakflowratepersize.helper: Durchfluss Satz for a given leak size at standard Druck (100 psi). Pre-calculated based on orifice size: 1mm=1.5 cfm, 3mm=11 cfm, 5mm=30 cfm, 10mm=120 cfm. Source: Compressed Air Challenge.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjustment factor: low=0.8, medium=1.0, high=1.2. verbraucht for risk-adjusted Kosten estimation.

employerratepercent.label: Employer burden Satz
employerratepercent.helper: Payroll taxes, social charges and statutory load.

monthlybenefits.label: Monthly benefits
monthlybenefits.helper: Health, meal, Transport and other monthly benefits.

annualsalary.label: Annual Salary
annualsalary.helper: Base salary paid to employee pro year. Standard HR practice.

bonuspercentage.label: Bonus procentage
bonuspercentage.helper: Annual bonus as procentage of salary. Common in compensation packages.

benefitscost.label: Benefits Kosten
benefitscost.helper: Health insurance, retirement contributions, etc. Typical range 30-40% of salary.

payrolltaxrate.label: Payroll Tax Satz
payrolltaxrate.helper: Social Security and Medicare taxes (FICA). US standard 7.65%.

trainingcost.label: Training Kosten
trainingcost.helper: Annual training expenses pro employee. Industry benchmark varies.

overheadrate.label: Overhead Satz
overheadrate.helper: Facilities, utilities, admin support. Common allocation method.

workingdaysperyear.label: Working Tage pro Year
workingdaysperyear.helper: Standard workTage excluding weekEndes and holiTage.

productivityrate.label: Productivity Satz
productivityrate.helper: procentage of paid time actually productive. Lean metric.

downtimeminutes.label: Downtime minutes
downtimeminutes.helper: Unplanned or scheduled stop minutes in the proiod.

hourlyrate.label: Shop Hourly Satz
hourlyrate.helper: Loaded machine or line hourly Kosten.

outputunitsperhour.label: Output units pro hour
outputunitsperhour.helper: Typical Gute Einheiten produced pro running hour.

annualoperatinghours.label: Annual Oproating Stunden
annualoperatinghours.helper: Total Stunden the facility opeSatzs pro year. Based on standard industrial engineering practice (Maynard's Industrial Engineering Handbook).

totaldowntimeminutes.label: Total Downtime Minutes
totaldowntimeminutes.helper: Total minutes of unplanned downtime in the proiod. Key metric in OEE (Gesamtanlageneffektivität) and Lean manufacturing.

hourlycostrate.label: Hourly Kosten Satz
hourlycostrate.helper: Total Kosten pro hour of oproation including labor, overhead, and opportunity Kosten. Based on activity-based Kostening principles.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts output for uncertainty. Common in risk analysis (ISO 31000).

revenue.label: Revenue
revenue.helper: Customer or SKU revenue in the proiod.

servicecost.label: Service Kosten
servicecost.helper: Support, delivery rework and account service load.

returnscost.label: Returns Kosten
returnscost.helper: Returns, credits and rework tied to the account.

revenueperunit.label: Revenue pro Unit
revenueperunit.helper: Average selling Preis pro unit. Based on standard Kosten accounting principles (Horngren).

unitssold.label: Units Sold
unitssold.helper: Total Menge sold to customer over analysis proiod. From sales records.

variablecostperunit.label: Variable Kosten pro unit
variablecostperunit.helper: Direct Materials, direct labor, variable overhead pro unit. Based on standard Kostening (ABC).

fixedcostallocation.label: Fixed Kosten Allocation
fixedcostallocation.helper: Allocated Fixed Kostens (e.g., factory Miete, equipment depreciation) for this product-customer. Based on activity-based Kostening (Kaplan).

customerspecificcosts.label: Customer-Specific Kostens
customerspecificcosts.helper: Kostens directly attributable to customer (e.g., special packaging, logistics, sales support). From customer profitability analysis (Shapiro).

discountsandallowances.label: Rabatts and Allowances
discountsandallowances.helper: Preis Rabatts, trade allowances, rebates given to customer. Standard in trade spEnde analysis.

returnrate.label: Return Satz
returnrate.helper: procentage of units returned by customer. Based on quality metrics (Six Sigma).

costofcapital.label: Kosten of Capital
costofcapital.helper: Gewichted average Kosten of capital (WACC) for the firm. Standard finance (Brealey & Myers).

averagecollectionperiod.label: Average Collection proiod
averagecollectionperiod.helper: Tage sales outstanding for this customer. From accounts receivable aging.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. verbraucht for risk adjustment (ISO 31000).

annualdemand.label: Annual Demand (units)
annualdemand.helper: Total Menge of product demanded pro year. Based on APICS/SCOR standards for demand planning.

ordercost.label: Order Kosten
ordercost.helper: Fixed Kosten pro purchase order placed.

unitcost.label: Unit Kosten ($)
unitcost.helper: Purchase Kosten pro unit. verbraucht to compute total inventory Wert And carrying Kosten as procentage of Unit Kosten.

carryingcostpercent.label: Carrying Kosten Satz
carryingcostpercent.helper: Annual carrying Kosten as procent of inventory Wert.

orderingcost.label: Ordering Kosten pro Order ($)
orderingcost.helper: Fixed Kosten incurred pro order (e.g., administrative, shipping). Referenced in EOQ model by Harris (1913) and widely verbraucht in inventory management.

holdingcostperunitperyear.label: Holding Kosten pro unit pro Year ($)
holdingcostperunitperyear.placeholder: Holding Kosten pro unit pro Year ($) eingeben
holdingcostperunitperyear.helper: Kosten to hold one unit of inventory for one year, including storage, insurance, obsolescence. Based on standard inventory carrying Kosten calculations (APICS).

carryingcostrate.label: Carrying Kosten Satz (% of Unit Kosten pro year)
carryingcostrate.placeholder: Carrying Kosten Satz (% of Unit Kosten pro year) eingeben
carryingcostrate.helper: Annual carrying Kosten as a procentage of Unit Kosten. Typical range 15-30% pro year (industry benchmarks from WERC, APICS).

leadtimedays.label: Lead Time (Tage)
leadtimedays.helper: Time from order placement to receipt. verbraucht for reorder point calculation. Standard in inventory management.

safetystock.label: Safety Stock (units)
safetystock.helper: Extra inventory held to mitigate uncertainty in demand or lead time. Based on service level and demand variability (Six Sigma).

workingdaysperyear.label: Working Tage pro Year
workingdaysperyear.helper: Number of oproating Tage pro year. verbraucht to convert lead time to annual demand Satz. Standard assumption.

safetyfactor.label: Sicherheitsfaktor
safetyfactor.helper: Auf die zulässige Spannung angewandter Sicherheitsfaktor.

assemblylimit.label: Assembly limit
assemblylimit.helper: Maximum allowable stack for the assembly chain.

clampforcekn.label: Klemmkraft
clampforcekn.helper: Sollwert clamp or preload force for the joint.

frictionfactor.label: Friction factor
frictionfactor.helper: Nut factor K for dry steel (typical 0.15–0.25).

boltdiameter.label: SchraubEndeurchmesser
boltdiameter.helper: ISO 898-1: Mechanical proproties of fasteners. SchraubEndeurchmesser is a primary factor in torque calculation.

threadpitch.label: Thread Pitch
threadpitch.helper: ISO 68-1: Basic profile of metric screw threads. Affects torque-tension relationship.

frictioncoefficient.label: Friction Coefficient
frictioncoefficient.helper: VDI 2230: Systematic calculation of high duty bolted joints. Typical Werts: 0.10-0.20 for lubricated, 0.15-0.30 for dry.

preloadforce.label: Preload Force
preloadforce.helper: Sollwert clamping force required for joint integrity. Based on joint design and service loads.

nutfactor.label: Nut Factor (K)
nutfactor.helper: Empirical factor combining thread and underhead friction. Typical K=0.2 for as-received condition pro SAE J1701.

torquemethod.label: Torque Method
torquemethod.helper: ISO 16047: Tightening torque test methods. Torque control is most common; torque-angle provides higher accuracy.

lubricationcondition.label: Lubrication Condition
lubricationcondition.helper: Affects friction coefficient. pro VDI 2230: dry (0.15-0.30), oiled (0.10-0.20), coated (0.05-0.12).

protectedaream2.label: Protected Fläche
protectedaream2.helper: Design Fläche covered by the hydrant Nettowork.

designdensitylpmm2.label: Design Dichte
designdensitylpmm2.helper: Reference design Dichte for the occupancy class.

hydrantcapacitylpm.label: Hydrant capacity
hydrantcapacitylpm.helper: Available Durchfluss pro hydrant at required Druck.

buildingtype.label: Building Type
buildingtype.helper: Based on NFPA 13 and local fire codes; building type deLaufzeitines required Durchfluss Dichte and Fläche.

hazardclassification.label: Hazard Classification
hazardclassification.helper: pro NFPA 13, hazard classification affects design Dichte and Fläche of oproation.

sprinklercoveragearea.label: Sprinkler Abdeckfläche
sprinklercoveragearea.helper: Typical Abdeckfläche pro sprinkler head; varies by spacing and hazard (NFPA 13).

numberofsprinklers.label: Number of Sprinklers
numberofsprinklers.helper: Total sprinklers in the design Fläche; verbraucht to calculate total Durchfluss demand.

designdensity.label: Design Dichte
designdensity.helper: Required water Dichte pro NFPA 13 based on hazard classification; typical range 0.05-0.6 gpm/sq ft.

hydrantflowrate.label: Hydrant Durchfluss Satz
hydrantflowrate.helper: Available Durchfluss from hydrant; typical municipal supply ranges 500-2500 gpm.

numberofhydrants.label: Number of Hydrants
numberofhydrants.helper: Number of hydrants available for firefighting; affects total supply capacity.

simultaneoushydrantdemand.label: Simultaneous Hydrant Demand
simultaneoushydrantdemand.helper: Expected demand pro hydrant during fire; typical 500-1500 gpm pro hydrant.

frictionlossfactor.label: Friction Loss Factor
frictionlossfactor.helper: Friction loss in piping pro 100 ft; depEndes on pipe Material and Durchmesser (Hazen-Williams).

pipelength.label: Pipe Länge
pipelength.helper: Total Länge of pipe from source to farthest sprinkler/hydrant.

elevationchange.label: Elevation Change
elevationchange.helper: Positive if uphill; affects Druck due to elevation head (0.433 psi/ft).

requiredpressureatoutlet.label: Required Druck at Outlet
requiredpressureatoutlet.helper: Minimum Druck required at sprinkler or hydrant outlet; typical 50 psi.

watersupplypressure.label: Water Supply Druck
watersupplypressure.helper: Static Druck at water source; typical municipal supply 40-100 psi.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data; verbraucht to adjust final results for uncertainty.

pressurebar.label: System Druck
pressurebar.helper: Working Druck at the cylinder port.

rodmm.label: Rod Durchmesser
rodmm.helper: Rod Durchmesser for retract force (optional screening).

pressure.label: Druck
pressure.helper: Oproating Druck of the hydraulic or pneumatic system. Typical range: 1-350 bar for hydraulics, 1-10 bar for pneumatics. Based on ISO 4414 (pneumatics) and ISO 4413 (hydraulics).

pistondiameter.label: Piston Durchmesser
pistondiameter.helper: Durchmesser of the cylinder piston. Standard sizes pro ISO 3320 (hydraulic/pneumatic cylinders).

roddiameter.label: Rod Durchmesser
roddiameter.helper: Durchmesser of the piston rod. Affects effective Fläche on retraction stroke. Standard sizes pro ISO 3320.

cylindertype.label: Cylinder Type
cylindertype.helper: Single-acting cylinders use Druck on one side only; double-acting use Druck on both sides. Common in industrial applications pro ISO 6020/6022.

fluidtype.label: Fluid Type
fluidtype.helper: Hydraulic uses incompressible oil; pneumatic uses compressible air. Affects force calculation (pneumatic may have Druck drop due to compressibility).

efficiency.label: Wirkungsgrad
efficiency.helper: Mechanical efficiency accounting for friction losses. Typical 80-95% for hydraulic cylinders, 70-90% for pneumatic. Based on manufacturer data and ISO 4391.

preventioncost.label: Prevention Kostens
preventioncost.helper: Kostens of activities to prevent defects (e.g., training, process control). Based on PAF model (ISO 9001).

appraisalcost.label: Appraisal Kostens
appraisalcost.helper: Kostens of Prüfung and testing to detect defects. PAF model.

failurecost.label: Failure Kosten
failurecost.helper: Scrap, rework, warranty and downtime from defects.

totalsales.label: Total Sales Revenue
totalsales.helper: Annual total sales revenue. verbraucht as basis for Kosten ratios. Standard financial metric.

internalfailurecost.label: Internal Failure Kostens
internalfailurecost.helper: Kostens from defects found before delivery (scrap, rework). PAF model.

externalfailurecost.label: External Failure Kostens
externalfailurecost.helper: Kostens from defects found after delivery (warranty, returns). PAF model.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: User's confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts final result for uncertainty.

designpressurebar.label: Design Druck
designpressurebar.helper: Internal Design Druck for the vessel.

diametermm.label: Inside Durchmesser
diametermm.helper: Nominal inside Durchmesser of the shell.

allowablestressmpa.label: Zulässige Spannung
allowablestressmpa.helper: Material Zulässige Spannung at design temproature.

designpressure.label: Design Druck (Internal)
designpressure.helper: Maximum allowable working Druck pro ASME BPVC Section VIII Div.1 UG-21.

vesselinnerradius.label: Vessel Inner Radius
vesselinnerradius.helper: Inner Radius of cylindrical shell pro ASME BPVC Section VIII Div.1 UG-27.

allowablestress.label: Allowable Stress of Material
allowablestress.helper: Maximum allowable stress Wert pro ASME BPVC Section II Part D, Table 1A.

jointefficiency.label: Joint Efficiency (Longitudinal)
jointefficiency.helper: Efficiency of welded joints pro ASME BPVC Section VIII Div.1 UW-12. Werts correspond to joint categories and degree of radiography.

corrosionallowance.label: Corrosion Allowance
corrosionallowance.helper: Additional Dicke to account for corrosion over design life pro ASME BPVC Section VIII Div.1 UG-25.

materialtype.label: Material Type
materialtype.helper: Material classification for corrosion allowance and stress Werts.

processminutes.label: Process time
processminutes.helper: Total Wert-added processing minutes in the stream.

proposedkwhmonthly.label: Proposed monthly kWh
proposedkwhmonthly.helper: Expected monthly use after the savings package.

projectcost.label: Project Kosten
projectcost.helper: Total capex for the efficiency package.

annualenergyconsumption.label: Annual Energie Verbrauch
annualenergyconsumption.helper: Total annual Energie usage of the facility. Based on ISO 50001 Energie baseline.

energycostperkwh.label: Energie Kosten pro kWh
energycostperkwh.helper: Average Kosten of electricity. Varies by region and tariff.

peakdemand.label: Peak Demand
peakdemand.helper: Maximum Leistung demand in kW. verbraucht for demand charge calculations.

demandchargeperkw.label: Demand Charge pro kW
demandchargeperkw.helper: Monthly demand charge Satz from utility.

operatinghoursperday.label: Oproating Stunden pro Day
operatinghoursperday.helper: Daily oproating Stunden of the facility.

operatingdaysperyear.label: Oproating Tage pro Year
operatingdaysperyear.helper: Number of oproating Tage pro year.

energysavingspercentage.label: Expected Energie Savings procentage
energysavingspercentage.helper: Estimated procentage reduction in Energie Verbrauch from proposed measures.

peakdemandreductionpercentage.label: Peak Demand Reduction procentage
peakdemandreductionpercentage.helper: Estimated procentage reduction in peak demand.

implementationcost.label: Implementation Kosten
implementationcost.helper: Total upfront Kosten for Energie saving measures.

maintenancecostincreaseperyear.label: Annual Maintenance Kosten Increase
maintenancecostincreaseperyear.helper: Additional annual maintenance Kosten due to new equipment.

discountrate.label: Rabatt Satz
discountrate.helper: Rabatt Satz for NPV calculation. Typically company's WACC.

projectlifeyears.label: Project Life (Jahre)
projectlifeyears.helper: Expected Nutzungsdauer of the Energie saving measures.

inflationrate.label: Inflation Satz
inflationrate.helper: Expected annual Inflation Satz for Energie Kostens.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Affects risk adjustment.

initialinvestment.label: Initial Investment
initialinvestment.helper: Total upfront Kosten including equipment, installation, and training. Based on capital budgeting standards (CAPM, NPV).

discountratepercent.label: Rabatt Satz
discountratepercent.helper: Required return or Kosten of capital.

annualcashinflow.label: Annual Cash InDurchfluss
annualcashinflow.helper: Expected annual Netto cash inDurchfluss from the investment. verbraucht in payback proiod and NPV calculations.

discountrate.label: Rabatt Satz
discountrate.helper: Required Satz of return or Kosten of capital. Typically based on WACC or industry benchmark (e.g., CAPM).

projectlifeyears.label: Project Life (Jahre)
projectlifeyears.helper: Expected Dauer of the investment's cash Durchflusss. verbraucht for NPV and IRR calculations.

salvagevalue.label: Restwert
salvagevalue.helper: Estimated residual Wert At Ende of project life. Included in final year cash Durchfluss for NPV.

annualoperatingcost.label: Annual Oproating Kosten
annualoperatingcost.helper: Recurring Kostens such as maintenance, labor, and utilities. Subtracted from cash inDurchfluss to get Netto cash Durchfluss.

taxrate.label: Tax Satz

equipmentcostperyear.label: Yıllık Ekipman Maliyeti
equipmentcostperyear.helper: Atık yöNettoimi ekipmanlarının (kamyon, konteyner, vb.) yıllık amortisman ve bakım maliyeti.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güven Düzeyi
dataconfidence.helper: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirliği. Düşük güven durumunda sonuçlar daha temkinli yorumlanmalıdır.

flowrate.label: Debi (Q)
flowrate.helper: Sıvı akış debisi. Boru hattı tasarımında temel parametre. Kaynak: Darcy-Weisbach denklemi, ISO 5167.

pipediameter.label: Boru İç Çapı (D)
pipediameter.helper: Boru iç çapı. Sürtünme kaybı hesaplamalarında kullanılır. Kaynak: Darcy-Weisbach, ISO 6708.

pipelength.label: Boru Uzunluğu (L)
pipelength.helper: Boru hattı toplam uzunluğu. Sürtünme kaybı mesafe ile orantılıdır. Kaynak: Darcy-Weisbach.

roughness.label: Boru Pürüzlülüğü (ε)
roughness.helper: Boru iç yüzey pürüzlülüğü. Sürtünme faktörünü etkiler. Kaynak: Moody diyagramı, ISO 9906.

fluiddensity.label: Akışkan Yoğunluğu (ρ)
fluiddensity.helper: Akışkan yoğunluğu. Su için 1000 kg/m³. Kaynak: Standart sıvı özellikleri.

fluidviscosity.label: Akışkan Dinamik Viskozitesi (μ)
fluidviscosity.helper: Akışkan viskozitesi. Reynolds sayısı hesaplamak için. Kaynak: Newton tipi akışkanlar.

pumpefficiency.label: Pompa Verimi (η)
pumpefficiency.helper: Pompa verimliliği. Enerji tüketimi hesaplamalarında kullanılır. Kaynak: Pompa standartları (ISO 9906).

electricitycost.label: Elektrik Birim Maliyeti
electricitycost.helper: Elektrik enerjisi maliyeti. Enerji kaybının parasal karşılığı. Kaynak: EPDK tarifeleri.

operatinghours.label: Yıllık Çalışma Saati
operatinghours.helper: Pompanın yıllık çalışma süresi. Enerji maliyeti hesaplamaları için. Kaynak: Endeüstriyel uygulamalar.

fittinglosscoefficient.label: Ek Parça Kayıp Katsayısı (K)
fittinglosscoefficient.helper: Dirsek, vana gibi ek parçaların toplam kayıp katsayısı. Kaynak: Crane Technical Papro No. 410.

annualproductionvolume.label: Annual Production Volumen
annualproductionvolume.helper: Total annual production of paint and coating in tons. Based on industry benchmarks (e.g., WERC).

batchsize.label: Batch Size
batchsize.helper: Typical batch size for production. Affects Rüstzeit Kostens and efficiency. Lean manufacturing principles (JIT).

rawmaterialcostperton.label: Raw Material Kosten pro Ton
rawmaterialcostperton.placeholder: Raw Material Kosten pro Ton eingeben
rawmaterialcostperton.helper: Kosten of raw Materials (resins, pigments, solvents) pro ton. Based on market Preiss and ISO 14000 environmental Kosten accounting.

laborcostperhour.label: Labor Kosten pro Hour
laborcostperhour.helper: Hourly labor Kosten including benefits. Standard industrial engineering Kosten estimation (Maynard).

laborhoursperbatch.label: Labor Stunden pro Batch
laborhoursperbatch.helper: Direct Labor Stunden required pro batch. Based on time studies (SalvEndey).

energycostperkwh.label: Energie Kosten pro kWh
energycostperkwh.helper: Kosten of electricity pro kWh. ISO 50001 Energie management standard.

energyconsumptionperbatch.label: Energie Verbrauch pro Batch
energyconsumptionperbatch.helper: Verbrauchte Energie pro batch (mixing, heating, drying). ISO 50001.

defectrate.label: Defect Satz
defectrate.helper: Fraction of batches that are defective. Six Sigma quality metric (DPMO).

reworkcostperton.label: Rework Kosten pro Ton
reworkcostperton.helper: Kosten to rework defective product pro ton. Includes Material, labor, Energie. ISO 9001 quality management.

setuptimeperbatch.label: Rüstzeit Time pro Batch
setuptimeperbatch.helper: Time to Rüstzeit equipment between batches. SMED (Single-Minute Exchange of Die) lean tool.

setupcostperhour.label: Rüstzeit Kosten pro Hour
setupcostperhour.helper: Kosten of Rüstzeit labor and overhead pro hour. Based on activity-based Kostening.

wastedisposalcostperton.label: Ausschuss Disposal Kosten pro Ton
wastedisposalcostperton.placeholder: Ausschuss Disposal Kosten pro Ton eingeben
wastedisposalcostperton.helper: Kosten to dispose of Ausschuss pro ton. Environmental regulations (ISO 14000).

wasterate.label: Ausschuss Satz
wasterate.helper: Fraction of raw Material that becomes Ausschuss. Lean manufacturing Ausschuss reduction.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data accuracy. verbraucht for risk adjustment.

steampressure.label: Buhar Basıncı
steampressure.helper: Buhar kapanı girişindeki buhar basıncı. ISO 50001 enerji yöNettoimi standardına göre enerji kaybı hesaplamalarında temel parametre.

orificediameter.label: Orifis Çapı
orificediameter.helper: Kaçak orifisinin tahmini çapı. Endeüstriyel buhar sistemlerinde kaçak debisi hesaplamak için kullanılır.

steamcost.label: Buhar Maliyeti
steamcost.helper: Ton buhar başına maliyet. Enerji maliyet analizi için gereklidir.

operatinghours.label: Yıllık Çalışma Saati
operatinghours.helper: Sistemin yıllık çalışma süresi. Enerji kaybının yıllık maliyete dönüştürülmesinde kullanılır.

steamtype.label: Buhar Türü
steamtype.helper: Doymuş veya kızgın buhar. Buharın Laufzeitodinamik özelliklerini belirler; kızgın buhar için düzeltme faktörü uygulanır.

dischargecoefficient.label: Deşarj Katsayısı
dischargecoefficient.helper: Orifis geometrisine bağlı akış katsayısı. Standart değer 0.65 olup, keskin kenarlı orifisler için geçerlidir.

cabinetwidth.label: CabiNetto Breite
cabinetwidth.helper: Standard cabiNetto Breite based on modular kitchen design (ISO 7170).

cabinetheight.label: CabiNetto Höhe
cabinetheight.helper: Standard cabiNetto Höhe for base cabiNettos (ISO 7170).

materialtype.label: Material Type
materialtype.helper: Common Materials for cabiNetto construction (ANSI/KCMA A161.1).

materialcostpersqm.label: Material Kosten pro Square Meter
materialcostpersqm.placeholder: Material Kosten pro Square Meter eingeben
materialcostpersqm.helper: Market Preis for selected Material (industry benchmarks).

doorstyle.label: Door Style
doorstyle.helper: Door style affects labor and Material Kosten (KCMA standards).

finishtype.label: Finish Type
finishtype.helper: Finish type impacts Kosten and durability (ANSI/KCMA A161.1).

hardwaregrade.label: Hardware Grade
hardwaregrade.helper: Hardware quality affects Kosten and lifespan (ANSI/BHMA A156.9).

laborrate.label: Labor Satz pro Hour
laborrate.helper: Average carpenter Labor Satz (Bureau of Labor Statistics).

laborhourspercabinet.label: Labor Stunden pro CabiNetto
laborhourspercabinet.helper: Standard labor time for cabiNetto assembly (industrial engineering time studies).

quantity.label: Menge
quantity.helper: Number of identical cabiNettos to estimate Total Kosten.

overheadrate.label: Overhead Satz
overheadrate.helper: Manufacturing overhead as procentage of direct Kostens (Kosten accounting standards).

profitmargin.label: Profit Margin
profitmargin.helper: Desired profit margin on Total Kosten (industry standard 10-20%).

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level in input data for risk adjustment.

areasize.label: Fläche to Clean
areasize.helper: Total Fläche to be cleaned in Quadratmeter. Based on industry standards for facility management (ISO 41001).

cleaningfrequency.label: Cleaning Frequency
cleaningfrequency.helper: How often cleaning is proformed. Common frequencies in janitorial services.

laborrate.label: Labor Satz pro Hour
laborrate.helper: Hourly wage for cleaning staff. Based on minimum wage and market Satzs (BLS data).

laborproductivity.label: Labor Productivity
laborproductivity.helper: Fläche cleaned pro hour pro worker. Typical range from industry benchmarks (ISSA).

suppliescostpersqm.label: Supplies Kosten pro sqm
suppliescostpersqm.helper: Kosten of cleaning supplies (detergents, disinfectants) pro square meter. Based on average Verbrauch Satzs.

equipmentcostpersqm.label: Equipment Kosten pro sqm
equipmentcostpersqm.helper: Depreciation and maintenance Kosten of cleaning equipment pro square meter. Includes vacuum cleaners, floor polishers.

wastedisposalcostpersqm.label: Ausschuss Disposal Kosten pro sqm
wastedisposalcostpersqm.placeholder: Ausschuss Disposal Kosten pro sqm eingeben
wastedisposalcostpersqm.helper: Kosten for Ausschuss removal and disposal pro square meter. Based on local Ausschuss management Satzs.

overheadpercentage.label: Overhead procentage
overheadpercentage.helper: Indirect Kostens (management, insurance, training) as procentage of direct Kostens. Typical range 15-30% in service industries.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjustment factor for final Kosten.

annualoperatinghours.label: Yıllık Çalışma Saati
annualoperatinghours.helper: Yıllık toplam çalışma saati, vardiya düzenine göre belirlenir. ISO 9001 süreç yöNettoimi kapsamında standart çalışma süresi.

manuallaborcostperhour.label: Manuel İşçilik Saatlik Maliyeti
manuallaborcostperhour.helper: İşçilik maliyeti; brüt ücret, SGK işveren payı, yemek, yol gibi yan hakları içerir. Endeüstri mühEndeisliğinde işçilik maliyet hesaplamaları.

cobotpurchasecost.label: Cobot Satın Alma Maliyeti
cobotpurchasecost.helper: Cobot'un toplam satın alma fiyatı; ekipman, kurulum, yazılım lisansı dahil. Yatırım maliyeti olarak NPV hesaplamalarında kullanılır.

cobotmaintenancecostperyear.label: Cobot Yıllık Bakım Maliyeti
cobotmaintenancecostperyear.helper: Yıllık bakım, yedek parça ve servis maliyetleri. ISO 50001 enerji yöNettoimi ve ekipman bakım planlaması.

cobotenergycostperhour.label: Cobot Saatlik Enerji Maliyeti
cobotenergycostperhour.helper: Cobot'un çalışma saatindeki elektrik tüketimi maliyeti. Enerji verimliliği hesaplamaları.

cobotlifespanyears.label: Cobot Ekonomik Ömrü
cobotlifespanyears.helper: Cobot'un faydalı ömrü; amortisman süresi olarak kullanılır. Muhasebe standartları ve yatırım değerleme.

discountrate.label: İskonto Oranı
discountrate.helper: Sermaye maliyeti veya alternatif yatırım getirisi. NPV hesaplamasında kullanılır. Finansal oranlar.

manuallaborproductivity.label: Manuel İşçilik Verimliliği
manuallaborproductivity.helper: Manuel işçinin standart süreye göre proformansı. Endeüstri mühEndeisliğinde iş ölçümü ve verimlilik analizi.

cobotproductivity.label: Cobot Verimliliği
cobotproductivity.helper: Cobot'un teorik kapasiteye göre çalışma verimi. OEE hesaplamaları.

defectratemanual.label: Manuel Hata Oranı
defectratemanual.helper: Manuel işçilikteki kusur oranı. Six Sigma kalite metrikleri.

defectratecobot.label: Cobot Hata Oranı
defectratecobot.helper: Cobot ile üretimdeki kusur oranı. Poka-Yoke ve otomasyon kalitesi.

reworkcostperdefect.label: Hata Başına Yeniden İşleme Maliyeti
reworkcostperdefect.placeholder: Hata Başına Yeniden İşleme Maliyeti eingeben
reworkcostperdefect.helper: Kusurlu ürünün düzeltilmesi için katlanılan maliyet. Kalite maliyetleri (COPQ).

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güveni
dataconfidence.helper: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirliği. Düşük güven durumunda sonuçlar daha muhafazakar hesaplanır.

usl.label: Üst Spesifikasyon Limiti (USL)
usl.helper: Müşteri gereksinimlerini tanımlar. ISO 9001 kalite yöNettoim sistemlerinde spesifikasyon limitleri belirlenir.

lsl.label: Alt Spesifikasyon Limiti (LSL)
lsl.helper: Müşteri gereksinimlerini tanımlar. ISO 9001 kalite yöNettoim sistemlerinde spesifikasyon limitleri belirlenir.

mean.label: Süreç Ortalaması
mean.helper: Sürecin merkezi eğilimini gösterir. Altı Sigma projelerinde süreç proformansı ölçümü için kullanılır.

stddev.label: Standart Sapma
stddev.helper: Süreç değişkenliğini ölçer. Altı Sigma'da süreç yetenek analizi için temel parametredir.

annualproductionvolume.label: Yıllık Üretim Hacmi
annualproductionvolume.helper: Toplam hata maliyetini hesaplamak için kullanılır. Üretim planlamasında temel girdidir.

costperdefect.label: Hata Başına Maliyet
costperdefect.helper: Hurda, yeniden işleme, garanti vb. maliyetleri içerir. Kalite maliyetleri (COQ) hesaplamalarında kullanılır.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güveni
dataconfidence.helper: Veri kalitesini değerlEndeirir. Düşük güven durumunda sonuçlar daha muhafazakar yorumlanmalıdır.

warehouselength.label: Depo Uzunluğu
warehouselength.helper: Depo fiziksel boyutu, yerleşim planı ve rota optimizasyonu için temel girdi. ISO 9001 ve WERC standartları referans alınır.

warehousewidth.label: Depo Genişliği
warehousewidth.helper: Depo fiziksel boyutu, yerleşim planı ve rota optimizasyonu için temel girdi.

numaisles.label: Koridor Sayısı
numaisles.helper: Koridor sayısı, toplama rotasının uzunluğunu ve verimliliğini etkiler. Lean prensipleri (JIT) referans alınır.

aislewidth.label: Koridor Genişliği
aislewidth.helper: Koridor genişliği, ekipman ve prosonel hareketini etkiler. OSHA standartları referans alınır.

numpicklocations.label: Toplama Noktası Sayısı
numpicklocations.helper: Toplama noktası sayısı, rota optimizasyonu için kritik. APICS ve WERC benchmarkları kullanılır.

ordersperday.label: Günlük Sipariş Sayısı
ordersperday.helper: Sipariş hacmi, iş gücü ve ekipman planlaması için temel girdi.

itemsperorder.label: Sipariş Başına Ortalama Kalem Sayısı
itemsperorder.placeholder: Sipariş Başına Ortalama Kalem Sayısı eingeben

picktimeperitem.label: Kalem Başına Toplama Süresi
picktimeperitem.helper: Oproasyonel verimlilik ölçütü. MTM (Methods-Time Measurement) standartları referans alınır.

travelspeed.label: Yürüme Hızı
travelspeed.helper: prosonel yürüme hızı, ergonomik ve güvenlik standartlarına göre belirlenir.

laborcostperhour.label: İşçilik Saatlik Maliyeti
laborcostperhour.helper: Finansal analiz için temel maliyet girdisi. Sektörel benchmarklar kullanılır.

layouttype.label: Yerleşim Tipi
layouttype.helper: Depo yerleşim tipi, rota uzunluğunu ve verimliliği etkiler. Lean ve Six Sigma prensipleri referans alınır.

routingstrategy.label: Rota StSatzjisi
routingstrategy.helper: Toplama rotası optimizasyonu için kullanılan stSatzjiler. Endeüstri mühEndeisliği literatürü (Ratliff & Rosenthal) referans alınır.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güveni
dataconfidence.helper: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirliğini ifade eder. Risk yöNettoimi için kullanılır.

initialinvestment.label: Initial Investment (USD)
initialinvestment.helper: Total upfront Kosten for product redesign, tooling, and process changes to extEnde product life. Based on capital budgeting principles (NPV/ROI).

annualrevenueperunit.label: Annual Revenue pro Unit (USD)
annualrevenueperunit.helper: Revenue geneSatzd pro product unit pro year. verbraucht to calculate revenue impact of extEndeed life. Standard financial metric.

unitssoldperyear.label: Units Sold pro Year
unitssoldperyear.helper: Annual sales Volumen. Key driver for revenue and Kosten calculations. Based on sales forecasting.

currentproductlifeyears.label: Strom Product Life (Jahre)
currentproductlifeyears.helper: Average lifespan of Strom product before replacement. DeLaufzeitines baseline replacement cycle. Industry benchmark data.

extendedproductlifeyears.label: ExtEndeed Product Life (Jahre)
extendedproductlifeyears.helper: Sollwert lifespan after circular economy improvements. Must be greater than Strom life. Based on design for longevity principles.

annualoperatingcostperunit.label: Annual Oproating Kosten pro unit (USD)
annualoperatingcostperunit.placeholder: Annual Oproating Kosten pro unit (USD) eingeben
annualoperatingcostperunit.helper: Kosten to maintain and opeSatz product pro year (e.g., Energie, repairs). Relevant for Total Kosten of ownership (TCO).

discountrate.label: Rabatt Satz (%)
discountrate.helper: Gewichted average Kosten of capital (WACC) or required Satz of return. verbraucht for NPV calculation. Standard finance.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Adjusts output reliability. Common in risk analysis.

materialtype.label: Malzeme Türü
materialtype.helper: Malzeme akma dayanımı ve ekstrüzyon basıncını belirler. Kaynak: ASM Metals Handbook.

billetdiameter.label: Billet Çapı
billetdiameter.helper: Başlangıç malzemesi çapı, kesit alanını ve kuvveti etkiler. Standart: ISO 6362.

billetlength.label: Billet Uzunluğu
billetlength.helper: Malzeme hacmini ve pres strokunu belirler.

extrusionratio.label: Ekstrüzyon Oranı
extrusionratio.helper: Başlangıç kesit alanının çıkış kesit alanına oranı. Kuvvet hesaplamasında kritik. Kaynak: Extrusion Handbook.

dieangle.label: Kalıp Açısı
dieangle.helper: Kalıp giriş açısı, deformasyon bölgesini ve kuvveti etkiler. Tipik değerler 30-60°.

frictioncoefficient.label: Sürtünme Katsayısı
frictioncoefficient.helper: Billet-kalıp arası sürtünme. Yağlama durumuna bağlı. Kaynak: Tribology in Metal Forming.

ramspeed.label: Pres Hızı
ramspeed.helper: Pres ram hızı, strain Satz ve kuvveti etkiler. Tipik değerler 1-20 mm/s.

temperature.label: Sıcaklık
temperature.helper: Malzeme akma dayanımını düşürür. Sıcak ekstrüzyon için 300-500°C. Kaynak: ASM.

containerdiameter.label: Konteyner Çapı
containerdiameter.helper: Billeti çevreleyen konteyner iç çapı. Billet çapından büyük olmalı.

presscapacity.label: Pres Kapasitesi
presscapacity.helper: Presin maksimum kuvvet kapasitesi. Mevcut pres seçimi için.

trainingcostperemployee.label: Çalışan Başına Eğitim Maliyeti
trainingcostperemployee.helper: Eğitim programının çalışan başına toplam maliyeti (eğitmen, materyal, tesis, seyahat vb.). ISO 10015 eğitim yöNettoimi standardı referans alınır.

numberofemployeestrained.label: Eğitilen Çalışan Sayısı
numberofemployeestrained.helper: Eğitime katılan toplam çalışan sayısı. İşgücü verimliliği hesaplamalarında temel girdi.

currentproductivity.label: Mevcut Verimlilik (birim/çalışan/saat)
currentproductivity.helper: Eğitim öncesi çalışan başına saatlik üretim miktarı. Endeüstri mühEndeisliğinde standart zaman etüdü ile belirlenir.

expectedproductivitygain.label: Beklenen Verimlilik Artışı (%)
expectedproductivitygain.helper: Eğitim sonrası beklenen verimlilik artış yüzdesi. Literatürde eğitimin verimliliğe etkisi %5-30 arasında raporlanmıştır (Bartel, 1994).

laborcostperhour.label: Saatlik İşgücü Maliyeti
laborcostperhour.helper: Çalışan başına saatlik işgücü maliyeti (ücret, yan haklar, işveren payı). Maliyet muhasebesi standartları.

workinghoursperday.label: Günlük Çalışma Saati
workinghoursperday.helper: Vardiya başına çalışma saati. İş kanunu ve Endeüstri standartları.

workingdaysperyear.label: Yıllık Çalışma Günü
workingdaysperyear.helper: Yıllık fiili çalışma günü sayısı (tatil, izin düşülmüş).

additionalbenefitsperemployee.label: Çalışan Başına Ek Fayda (TRY/yıl)
additionalbenefitsperemployee.helper: Eğitim sonucu elde edilen ek faydalar (kalite iyileştirme, fire azaltma, motivasyon artışı vb.).

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güveni
dataconfidence.helper: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirlik seviyesi. Düşük güven durumunda sonuçlar daha muhafazakar hesaplanır.

projecttype.label: Project Type
projecttype.helper: DeLaufzeitines base labor factors pro project complexity. Based on industry standards (NECA Manual of Labor Units).

totalcircuitlength.label: Total Circuit Länge
totalcircuitlength.helper: Total Länge of electrical circuits (conduit, cable tray, etc.). Affects pulling, Laufzeitination, and testing labor.

numberofdevices.label: Number of Devices
numberofdevices.helper: Count of outlets, switches, fixtures, panels, etc. Each device adds labor for mounting and wiring.

laborrate.label: Labor Satz
laborrate.helper: Hourly wage including burden. Based on local union Satzs or market surveys (RSMeans).

efficiencyfactor.label: Efficiency Factor
efficiencyfactor.helper: Adjusts for crew productivity (1.0 = standard). Factors: exproience, tools, site conditions. Lean principles.

complexityfactor.label: Complexity Factor
complexityfactor.helper: Multiplier for difficult installations (cramped spaces, high ceilings, etc.). Based on NECA labor units.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence in input data accuracy (1.0 = high). Adjusts final estimate for risk. ISO 9001 data quality.

totalenergyconsumption.label: Total Energie Verbrauch
totalenergyconsumption.helper: Total Verbrauchte Energie in the facility over the reporting proiod. Based on ISO 50001 Energie management standards.

productionoutput.label: Production Output
productionoutput.helper: Total units produced in the same proiod. verbraucht to calculate Energie intensity pro unit.

energycostperkwh.label: Energie Kosten pro kWh
energycostperkwh.helper: Average Kosten of Energie (electricity, gas, etc.) pro kWh. Based on utility bills.

baselineenergyintensity.label: Baseline Energie Intensity
baselineenergyintensity.helper: Historical or benchmark Energie intensity for comparison. verbraucht to calculate savings.

operatinghours.label: Oproating Stunden
operatinghours.helper: Total oproating Stunden in the proiod (e.g., 8760 for continuous annual oproation).

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in data accuracy. Adjusts final results for uncertainty.

annualenergyconsumption.label: Yıllık Enerji Tüketimi
annualenergyconsumption.helper: Toplam yıllık enerji tüketimi (elektrik, doğalgaz vb.). ISO 50001 enerji yöNettoim sistemi standardına göre temel girdi.

energycostperkwh.label: Birim Enerji Maliyeti
energycostperkwh.helper: Ortalama enerji birim fiyatı. Piyasa verileri veya fatura ortalaması.

systeminstallationcost.label: Sistem Kurulum Maliyeti
systeminstallationcost.helper: Enerji izleme sistemi (EMS) donanım, yazılım ve kurulum maliyeti. Piyasa araştırması.

annualmaintenancecost.label: Yıllık Bakım Maliyeti
annualmaintenancecost.helper: EMS bakım, lisans ve destek maliyeti. Genellikle kurulum maliyetinin %3-5'i.

expectedsavingspercentage.label: Beklenen Tasarruf Yüzdesi
expectedsavingspercentage.helper: EMS ile beklenen enerji tasarrufu oranı. Endeüstriyel benchmark: %5-20 (ISO 50001 vaka çalışmaları).

systemlifetime.label: Sistem Ömrü
systemlifetime.helper: EMS ekipmanının ekonomik ömrü. Genellikle 10-15 yıl.

discountrate.label: İskonto Oranı
discountrate.helper: Sermaye maliyeti veya alternatif yatırım getirisi. Finansal analiz standardı (NPV hesaplaması).

inflationrate.label: Enflasyon Oranı
inflationrate.helper: Yıllık enflasyon oranı. Gelecek nakit akışlarının reel değerini düzeltmek için.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güveni
dataconfidence.helper: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirlik seviyesi. Düşük güven durumunda sonuçlar düzeltilir.

partthickness.label: Part Dicke
partthickness.helper: Maximum wall Dicke of the plastic part. Critical for cooling time calculation. Based on ISO 294-4 and standard injection molding handbooks.

thermaldiffusivity.label: Thermal Diffusivity of Material
thermaldiffusivity.helper: Material proproty; typical Werts: PP ~0.08, ABS ~0.1, PC ~0.12. Source: Material datasheets.

moldtemperature.label: Mold Temproature
moldtemperature.helper: Temproature of the mold surface. Affects cooling Satz. Typical range 20-80°C for amorphous polymers.

melttemperature.label: Melt Temproature
melttemperature.helper: Temproature of the molten plastic entering the mold. Based on Material supplier recommEndeations.

ejectiontemperature.label: Ejection Temproature
ejectiontemperature.helper: Temproature at which part can be ejected without deformation. Typically 20-40°C below glass transition temproature.

injectiontime.label: Injection Time
injectiontime.helper: Time to fill the mold cavity. DepEndes on machine and part geometry.

packingtime.label: Packing Time
packingtime.helper: Time for holding Druck after filling to compensate shrinkage.

moldopenclosetime.label: Mold Open/Close Time
moldopenclosetime.helper: Time to open and close the mold. DepEndes on machine speed.

ejectiontime.label: Ejection Time
ejectiontime.helper: Time to eject the part from the mold.

materialcostperkg.label: Material Kosten pro kg
materialcostperkg.helper: Kosten of plastic Material pro kilogram.

machinehourlyrate.label: Machine Hourly Satz
machinehourlyrate.helper: Kosten pro hour to run the injection molding machine.

laborcostperhour.label: Labor Kosten pro Hour
laborcostperhour.helper: Oproator labor Kosten pro hour.

cavitycount.label: Number of Cavities
cavitycount.helper: Number of parts produced pro cycle.

scraprate.label: Scrap Satz
scraprate.helper: procentage of parts rejected. Typical range 1-5%.

machinepower.label: Machine Leistung
machinepower.helper: Leistung Verbrauch of the injection molding machine.

initialinvestment.label: Initial Investment (TL)
initialinvestment.helper: Total capital expEndeiture for flexible manufacturing cell including machinery, installation, and training. Based on standard investment appraisal practices (NPV, IRR).

annualoperatingcost.label: Annual Oproating Kosten (TL/year)
annualoperatingcost.helper: Yearly Kostens for labor, maintenance, Energie, and VerbrauchsMaterial. Referenced from lean manufacturing Kosten models.

annualrevenue.label: Annual Revenue from Cell (TL/year)
annualrevenue.helper: Expected yearly revenue geneSatzd by the flexible cell. Based on production capacity and market Preis.

discountrate.label: Rabatt Satz (%)
discountrate.helper: Gewichted average Kosten of capital (WACC) or required Satz of return. Standard financial metric (CAPM).

projectlife.label: Project Life (Jahre)
projectlife.helper: Expected Nutzungsdauer of the flexible manufacturing cell. Based on equipment depreciation standards (e.g., MACRS).

salvagevalue.label: Restwert (TL)
salvagevalue.helper: Estimated resale Wert At Ende of project life. Based on industry benchmarks for manufacturing equipment.

annualproductionvolume.label: Annual Production Volumen (units/year)
annualproductionvolume.helper: Number of units produced pro year. Key driver for revenue and Kosten pro unit.

defectrate.label: Defect Satz (%)
defectrate.helper: procentage of defective units. Lean Six Sigma quality metric; threshold >5% triggers warning.

setuptimeperbatch.label: Rüstzeit Time pro Batch (Stunden)
setuptimeperbatch.helper: Time to changeover between product variants. SMED methodology; lower is better for flexibility.

batchsize.label: Batch Size (units)
batchsize.helper: Number of units pro production batch. Affects inventory and Rüstzeit Kosten pro unit.

laborcostperhour.label: Labor Kosten pro Hour (TL/hour)
laborcostperhour.helper: Hourly wage including benefits. verbraucht to calculate labor Kosten pro unit.

energycostperunit.label: Energie Kosten pro unit (TL/unit)
energycostperunit.helper: Energie Verbrauch Kosten pro unit. ISO 50001 Energie management.

maintenancecostperyear.label: Maintenance Kosten pro Year (TL/year)
maintenancecostperyear.helper: Annual preventive and corrective maintenance. Based on equipment reliability standards.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence Level (0-1)
dataconfidence.helper: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. verbraucht to adjust output for uncertainty.

currentovertimehourspermonth.label: Strom Overtime Stunden pro Month
currentovertimehourspermonth.placeholder: Strom Overtime Stunden pro Month eingeben
currentovertimehourspermonth.helper: Total Overtime Stunden pro month. Based on labor law limits (e.g., max 270 Stunden/year in EU).

overtimehourlyrate.label: Overtime Hourly Satz
overtimehourlyrate.helper: Hourly wage for overtime, typically 1.5x normal Satz. Based on labor contracts.

newhiremonthlysalary.label: New Hire Monthly Salary
newhiremonthlysalary.helper: Gross monthly salary for a new full-time employee. Includes base pay.

newhireproductivityfactor.label: New Hire Productivity Factor
newhireproductivityfactor.helper: Productivity of new hire relative to exproienced worker. Typically 0.5-0.8 during ramp-up (Lean manufacturing).

recruitingcost.label: Recruiting Kosten pro Hire
recruitingcost.helper: One-time Kosten for advertising, interviews, background checks. Based on SHRM benchmarks.

trainingcost.label: Training Kosten pro Hire
trainingcost.helper: Kosten of onboarding and training. Includes trainer time, Materials. Based on industry averages.

monthlyproductivehoursperemployee.label: Monthly Productive Stunden pro Employee
monthlyproductivehoursperemployee.placeholder: Monthly Productive Stunden pro Employee eingeben
monthlyproductivehoursperemployee.helper: Standard productive Stunden pro month (e.g., 40 hrs/week * 4 weeks).

overtimepremiummultiplier.label: Overtime Premium Multiplier
overtimepremiummultiplier.helper: Multiplier for overtime pay (e.g., 1.5x for time-and-a-half). Based on labor laws.

employeeturnoverrate.label: Employee Turnover Satz (annual)
employeeturnoverrate.helper: Annual voluntary turnover Satz. Industry average 10-20% (Bureau of Labor Statistics).

overheadrate.label: Overhead Satz
overheadrate.helper: Overhead as procentage of direct labor Kosten (e.g., benefits, facilities). Typically 20-40%.

materialtype.label: Malzeme Türü
materialtype.helper: Seçilen malzeme türüne göre fire oranları ve maliyet hesaplamaları değişir. Endeüstriyel standartlara dayanır.

materialcostperkg.label: Malzeme Birim Maliyeti (TL/kg)
materialcostperkg.helper: Malzemenin kilogram başına satın alma maliyeti. Piyasa fiyatlarına göre belirlenir.

partweightgrams.label: Parça Ağırlığı (gram)
partweightgrams.helper: Üretilen her bir parçanın ağırlığı. Tasarım ve üretim sürecine bağlıdır.

productionvolume.label: Üretim Adedi (adet/yıl)
productionvolume.helper: Yıllık üretim miktarı. Ölçek ekonomisi ve fire oranlarını etkiler.

scraprate.label: Fire Oranı (%)
scraprate.helper: Üretim sırasında oluşan fire yüzdesi. Kalite kontrol ve süreç verimliliğine bağlıdır. ISO 9001 kalite standartları referans alınır.

recyclerate.label: Geri Dönüşüm Oranı (%)
recyclerate.helper: Fire malzemenin geri dönüştürülebilme oranı. Çevresel sürdürülebilirlik ve maliyet tasarrufu için önemlidir. ISO 14000 standartlarına dayanır.

recyclecostperkg.label: Geri Dönüşüm Maliyeti (TL/kg)
recyclecostperkg.helper: Fire malzemenin geri dönüştürülmesi için kilogram başına katlanılan maliyet. Geri dönüşüm sürecinin verimliliğine bağlıdır.

laborcostperhour.label: İşçilik Maliyeti (TL/saat)
laborcostperhour.helper: Üretimde çalışan işçilerin saatlik maliyeti. Endeüstriyel mühEndeislik hesaplamalarında kullanılır.

cycletimeminutes.label: Çevrim Süresi (dakika/parça)
cycletimeminutes.helper: Bir parçanın üretilmesi için geçen süre. Lean üretim ve verimlilik analizlerinde kullanılır.

machinecostperhour.label: Makine Maliyeti (TL/saat)
machinecostperhour.helper: Makinenin saatlik amortisman ve işletme maliyeti. Yatırım maliyeti ve bakım giderlerini içerir.

energycostperkwh.label: Enerji Maliyeti (TL/kWh)
energycostperkwh.helper: Kilowatt-saat başına enerji maliyeti. ISO 50001 enerji yöNettoimi standardı referans alınır.

powerconsumptionkw.label: Makine Güç Tüketimi (kW)
powerconsumptionkw.helper: Makinenin saatlik enerji tüketimi. Enerji maliyeti hesaplamalarında kullanılır.

dataconfidence.label: Veri Güveni (0-1)
dataconfidence.helper: Girdi verilerinin güvenilirlik seviyesi. Düşük güven durumunda sonuçlar ayarlanır. Risk yöNettoimi prensiplerine dayanır.

currentprice.label: Mevcut Fiyat
currentprice.helper: Ürünün mevcut satış fiyatı. Fiyatlandırma stSatzjisinin temel girdisi.

currentquantity.label: Mevcut Satış Miktarı
currentquantity.helper: Mevcut fiyattan satılan ürün miktarı. Talep tahminleri için baz.

pricechangepercent.label: Fiyat Değişim Yüzdesi
pricechangepercent.helper: Uygulanacak fiyat artışı veya azalışı yüzdesi. Pozitif değer artışı ifade eder.

priceelasticity.label: Talep Esnekliği
priceelasticity.helper: Fiyat değişimine karşı talep hassasiyeti. Genellikle negatif; mutlak değer büyüdükçe talep daha esnek. Standart mikroekonomi prensipleri.

variablecostperunit.label: Birim Değişken Maliyet
variablecostperunit.helper: Üretim veya hizmet başına değişken maliyet. Katkı payı hesaplamasında kullanılır.

fixedcost.label: Sabit Maliyetler
fixedcost.helper: Dönemlik sabit maliyetler (kira, maaş vb.). Kârlılık analizinde kullanılır.

timeperiod.label: Zaman proiyodu
timeperiod.helper: Analiz dönemi. Maliyet ve gelirlerin proiyoda göre ölçeklenmesi için.

fueltype.label: Kraftstoff Type
fueltype.helper: Kraftstoff type deLaufzeitines Energie Dichte and emission factors. Based on ISO 50001 Energie management standards.

fuelconsumption.label: Kraftstoff Verbrauch
fuelconsumption.helper: Measured Kraftstoff Verbrauch pro 100 km. For electric vehicles, use kWh/100km. Reference: SAE J1321 Kraftstoff Verbrauch test.

distance.label: Entfernung Driven
distance.helper: Total Entfernung traveled in the reporting proiod. verbraucht to calculate total Verbrauchter Kraftstoff.

fuelprice.label: Kraftstoff Preis
fuelprice.helper: Strom Preis pro unit of Kraftstoff. Source: local Kraftstoff Preis index.

operatinghours.label: Oproating Stunden
operatinghours.helper: Total oproating Stunden of the equipment. verbraucht for idle Verbrauch calculations.

idleconsumptionrate.label: Idle Verbrauch Satz
idleconsumptionrate.helper: Kraftstoff Verbrauch pro hour when idling. Based on engine specifications.

dataconfidence.label: Data Confidence
dataconfidence.helper: Confidence level of input data. Affects adjustment factor for final result.

annualproductionvolume.label: Annual Production Volumen
annualproductionvolume.helper: Total annual production Volumen in tons. Based on typical manufacturing throughput metrics (ISO 22400).

gradechangefrequency.label: Grade Change Frequency
gradechangefrequency.helper: Number of grade changes pro year. Common in process industries (e.g., steel, papro, chemicals) where product specifications change.

offspectimeperchange.label: Off-Spec Time pro Change
offspectimeperchange.helper: Average time pro grade change during which product is off-specification. Based on SMED principles and process transition data.

washtimeperchange.label: Wash Time pro Change
washtimeperchange.helper: Average time pro grade change for washing/cleaning equipment. Critical for contamination prevention (ISO 9001).

productionrate.label: Production Satz
productionrate.helper: Average production Satz during normal oproation. Key Leistung indicator (OEE).

costperton.label: Kosten pro Ton
